'''razoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylocopid|xylocopid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-z-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylocopid|xylocopid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| razoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræzeteth|ræzeteth]] || [[word:ræzetej|ræzetej]] || [[word:ræzetesh|ræzetesh]] || [[word:ræzete|ræzete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:razozototh|razozototh]] || [[word:razozotoj|razozotoj]] || [[word:razozotosh|razozotosh]] || [[word:razozoto|razozoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:razototh|razototh]] || [[word:razotoj|razotoj]] || [[word:razotosh|razotosh]] || [[word:razoto|razoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:razoftoth|razoftoth]] || [[word:razoftoj|razoftoj]] || [[word:razoftosh|razoftosh]] || [[word:razoftof|razoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:razototho|razototho]] || [[word:razotojo|razotojo]] || [[word:razotosho|razotosho]] || [[word:razotoko|razotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:razototh|razototh]] || [[word:razotoj|razotoj]] || [[word:razotosh|razotosh]] || [[word:razoto|razoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:razotothol|razotothol]] || [[word:razotojol|razotojol]] || [[word:razotoshol|razotoshol]] || [[word:razotokol|razotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:razotothotho|razotothotho]] || [[word:razotojojo|razotojojo]] || [[word:razotoshosho|razotoshosho]] || [[word:razotoko|razotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:razotothon|razotothon]] || [[word:razotojon|razotojon]] || [[word:razotoshon|razotoshon]] || [[word:razotokon|razotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:razotothoro|razotothoro]] || [[word:razotojoro|razotojoro]] || [[word:razotoshoro|razotoshoro]] || [[word:razotokoro|razotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
